name: TOTEM
description: 38キーのカラムスタッガードChoc分割キーボード。Seeed Studio XIAO nRF52840 BLE / XIAO RP2040 を前提に設計され、ケースなしでも使えるコンパクトなロープロファイルモデル。
descriptionEn: A 38-key column-staggered Choc split keyboard designed around the Seeed Studio XIAO nRF52840 BLE or XIAO RP2040. It is a compact low-profile board usable even without a case.
